SEARCH
Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance

Class AdHocSubProcessImpl

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.xml.impl.instance.ModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.BaseElementImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.FlowElementImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.FlowNodeImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.ActivityImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.SubProcessImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.AdHocSubProcessImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Activity, AdHocSubProcess, BaseElement, BpmnModelElementInstance, FlowElement, FlowNode, InteractionNode, SubProcess, ModelElementInstance
public class AdHocSubProcessImpl extends SubProcessImpl implements AdHocSubProcess
The BPMN 2.0 adHocSubProcess element implementation.

Note: the ordering attribute is persisted as BPMN model metadata. In the current engine implementation, ad-hoc runtime activation is parallel-only and "Sequential" is not enforced.

  • Method Details

    • registerType

      public static void registerType(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)

    • getOrdering

      public String getOrdering()
      Description copied from interface: AdHocSubProcess
      Returns the BPMN ordering attribute of the ad-hoc activities. Typical values are "Parallel" (default) and "Sequential".

      This is model metadata. In the current engine implementation, ad-hoc runtime activation is parallel-only and "Sequential" is not enforced as execution behavior.

      Specified by:
      getOrdering in interface AdHocSubProcess

    • setOrdering

      public void setOrdering(String ordering)
      Specified by:
      setOrdering in interface AdHocSubProcess

    • isCancelRemainingInstances

      public boolean isCancelRemainingInstances()
      Description copied from interface: AdHocSubProcess
      If true (default), when the completionCondition is met, any remaining running Activity instances within the Ad-Hoc Sub-Process will be cancelled.
      Specified by:
      isCancelRemainingInstances in interface AdHocSubProcess

    • setCancelRemainingInstances

      public void setCancelRemainingInstances(boolean cancelRemainingInstances)
      Specified by:
